Knob.name: crash_dump_enable
Knob.help: Enable/Disable Crash Dump when crash occurs.

Knob.name: crash_dump_warm_reset
Knob.help: Enable/Disable warm reset after Crash Dump is complete.

Knob.name: crash_dump_emit_only_minidump
Knob.help: Only emit minidump, even if full dump is available

Knob.name: crash_dump_transfer_try_interval_ms
Knob.help: Interval in milliseconds between transfer attempts of crash dump data.
